data.body:
[Main Story Update Celebration Special Gift]

Sensei, Schale prepared a celebration gift for the Main Story update!
Please check your mailbox for your gift of Pyroxene x1,200!
(Available until 5/24/2022 14:59 PM.(UTC))

https://nexon.link/9my
